message:
feat: token burn rate visualizations + gauge/actionable fixes (#145)

- Replace half-circle intensity gauge with burn rate sparkline showing
  high/low/avg reference lines and peak/avg/now/low context stats
- Add burn rate distribution area chart with p25-p75 percentile band
- Fix governor gauge to use issue count only (matches mode calculation)
- Center mode labels under their gauge bar segments
- Add GitHub CLI auth health check with sticky 401 banner

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
